hero.name: Yeo Kat Long
hero.tagline: Building custom game engines — from physics integration to OpenGL rendering pipelines — one allocation at a time.

about.label: About
about.title: The programmer behind the pipeline
paragraphs: I'm a Computer Science student at DigiPen Institute of Technology Singapore, specialising in real-time interactive simulation and graphics programming. Over three years I've shipped two custom game engines with my teams — integrating physics, building OpenGL rendering systems, and wiring up font rendering and 2D animation from scratch.

I'm comfortable working low in the stack: C++ memory management, x86-64 AT&T assembly, and the draw-call path from CPU to framebuffer. Before DigiPen I completed a Diploma in Electronics at Temasek Polytechnic, which gave me a grounding in hardware that shapes how I think about performance. I also teach as a TA for High-Level Programming and tutor first-year modules through the Academic Support Centre.

items.title: Left Behind
items.desc: 3D custom game engine and game. Responsible for integrating Jolt Physics — a high-performance rigid-body simulation library — into the engine's core systems.

items.title: RicoShaman
items.desc: 2D custom game engine and game. Built the OpenGL graphics rendering system, integrated FreeType for font rendering, and implemented the 2D animation system end-to-end.

items.title: Multiplayer Shooter
items.desc: Small-scale multiplayer shooting game. Responsible for the client-side lockstep framework and lockstep packet template base structure — keeping game state deterministically in sync across clients.

items.title: Game Jam Entry
items.desc: Participated in Global Game Jam Singapore 2026, designing and building a game in 48 hours using the Godot Engine.

items.title: SNAIC Applied AI Trainee
items.org: SIT x NVIDIA AI Centre — Singapore
items.desc: Contributing to customised AI model development and applied research at the SIT–NVIDIA AI Centre, building expertise in generative AI and foundation models on state-of-the-art infrastructure including the NVIDIA DGX H200.

items.title: Application Programmer
items.desc: Built a custom PDF viewer in Godot using gdCEF and PDF.js to display and programmatically control documents unsupported natively by the engine. Separately designed an offline SQLite database synchronisation system to keep data consistent across devices in internet-restricted environments.

items.title: Student Teaching Assistant
items.org: DigiPen Institute of Technology Singapore — Singapore
items.desc: Assist in delivering the High-Level Programming module — marking assessments, running lab sessions, and supporting students with C++ and object-oriented design.

items.title: Academic Support Centre Tutor
items.org: DigiPen Institute of Technology Singapore — Singapore
items.desc: Tutor one-on-one through the Academic Support Centre, covering core CS modules including programming fundamentals and discrete mathematics.

items.title: B.Sc. Computer Science in Real-Time Interactive Simulation
items.org: DigiPen Institute of Technology — Singapore Institute of Technology — Singapore
items.desc: Specialising in graphics programming, physics simulation, and systems-level C++. Built two full custom game engines across year-long team projects. CGPA: 4.06.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk
contact.text: I'm actively looking for internship and full-time opportunities in graphics, systems, or game engine programming. Drop me a line.

footer: Built by Yeo Kat Long — plain HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS
